docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2010 BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUIOTTO, PATRIZIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, GARY PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS; AND UNSUPPORTED BY EXPERT TESTIMONY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GUIOTTO, PATRIZIA AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUIOTTO, PATRIZIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUIOTTO, PATRIZIA AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, GARY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-16-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, GARY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.
